code:
%% Enhanced ai-roles-workflows-comprehensive_diagram_10.mmd with better fonts and colors
%% Generated by enhance_mermaid_diagrams.py

stateDiagram-v2
    [IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] --> Planning
    Planning --> Development
    Development --> Testing
    Testing --> Staging
    Staging --> Production
    Production --> Monitoring
    Monitoring --> Maintenance
    Maintenance --> Production
    Production --> Retirement
    Retirement --> [IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream]
    
    Testing --> Development : Issues Found
    Staging --> Development : Failures
    Production --> Development : Critical Bugs
    Monitoring --> Development : Performance Issues

classDef primary fill:#e8f4fd,stroke:#1976d2,stroke-width:3px,color:#0d47a1,font-size:14px,font-weight:bold
classDef secondary fill:#f3e5f5,stroke:#7b1fa2,stroke-width:3px,color:#4a148c,font-size:13px,font-weight:bold
classDef success fill:#e8f5e8,stroke:#388e3c,stroke-width:3px,color:#1b5e20,font-size:13px,font-weight:bold
classDef warning fill:#fff3e0,stroke:#f57c00,stroke-width:3px,color:#e65100,font-size:13px,font-weight:bold
classDef danger fill:#ffebee,stroke:#c62828,stroke-width:3px,color:#b71c1c,font-size:13px,font-weight:bold
classDef info fill:#e0f2f1,stroke:#00695c,stroke-width:3px,color:#004d40,font-size:13px,font-weight:bold
classDef light fill:#fff8e1,stroke:#fbc02d,stroke-width:3px,color:#f57f17,font-size:13px,font-weight:bold

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为工业物联网系统画一个完整的状态流转图，核心是从ActuatorController触发，经过Planning、Development、Testing这些阶段，最后流向TelemetryStream。关键是要有回退机制，比如Testing发现问题要能回到Development。

明白，主流程是Planning→Development→Testing→Staging→Production→Monitoring→Maintenance，然后Maintenance可以回到Production，最终Production到Retirement再到TelemetryStream。关于回退，除了Testing到Development的Issues Found，Staging失败、Production发现Critical Bugs、以及Performance Issues都需要回退到Development，对吗？
对，这四个回退场景都要标清楚。另外状态节点我想用不同颜色区分阶段类型——Planning和Development用蓝色系表示初始阶段，Testing和Staging用紫色系，Production和Monitoring用绿色表示运行态，Maintenance用橙色表示维护态，Retirement用红色表示终止态。

好的，我来配置样式类。primary类用浅蓝底色#e8f4fd配深蓝边框#1976d2给Planning和Development；secondary类用浅紫#f3e5f5配紫边框#7b1fa2给Testing和Staging；success类用浅绿#e8f5e8配绿边框#388e3c给Production和Monitoring；warning类用浅橙#fff3e0配橙边框#f57c00给Maintenance；danger类用浅红#ffebee配红边框#c62828给Retirement。字体都加粗，primary稍大14px，其余13px。
等等，我漏了一个——ActuatorController和TelemetryStream这两个外部系统节点，它们不是流程状态，应该用中性色区分开，比如浅黄色系，让它们视觉上像是边界接口。
已添加light类，用#fff8e1浅黄底色配#fbc02d边框，字体颜色#f57f17，这样ActuatorController作为起点和TelemetryStream作为终点都有统一的边界接口样式了。
确认一下回退边的标注：Testing到Development是Issues Found，Staging到Development是Failures，Production到Development是Critical Bugs，Monitoring到Development是Performance Issues——这些标签都要显示在箭头上，不能省略。
全部确认无误。主流程7个状态节点加2个边界系统，5条样式类定义，4条带标签的回退边，Maintenance到Production的闭环，以及最终到TelemetryStream的终止。图已完整。
